mutations.define: Test Validation
definesAffected: Test Validation
mutations.original: when Patient.id = 'Measles49.3' then "Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note" and "Guidance" = 'May vaccinate client with measles supplementary dose as supplementary dose was not administered, measles routine immunization schedule is complete and no live vaccine administered in the past 4 weeks.
mutations.modified: when Patient.id != 'Measles49.3' then "Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note" and "Guidance" = 'May vaccinate client with measles supplementary dose as supplementary dose was not administered, measles routine immunization schedule is complete and no live vaccine administered in the past 4 weeks.
